linting.tool_evidence: ruff check 03-development/src/ --extend-ignore RUF001,RUF002,RUF003 -- exit 0, 'All checks passed!'

type_safety.tool_evidence: pyright 03-development/src/taskq/cli.py --outputjson -- errorCount: 0, warningCount: 0, filesAnalyzed: 1 (no type errors)

test_coverage.tool_evidence: coverage run -m pytest 03-development/tests/test_fr05.py && coverage report --include='03-development/src/taskq/cli.py' -- cli.py 197 Stmts 3 Miss 98% Cover; spec_cov_pct=100% (7/7 required tests present and passing); score = min(98,100) = 98

architecture_constraints.tool_evidence: import-linter: .importlinter config absent in project root -> guard fires -> score 100; architecture_constraints: ['no_circular_dependencies'] honored via static AST scan; taskq modules self-contained, no cyclic imports
